package rulecoverage

import (
    "bytes"
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for go_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_small_enum_string_switch_map: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Layer: Data structure choice. Flag map lookups for tiny static enum-like string sets where switch can avoid allocation and hashing.
type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapModel
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapService struct {
    repo *CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMap(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGoPerfLayerDataStructureChoiceSmallEnumStringSwitchMapDTO) error {
    focus := "go_perf_layer_data_structure"
    _ = focus
    buf := []byte(input)
    seen := make(map[string]bool, len(items))
    for _, item := range items { seen[item.ID] = true }
    perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative := map[string]int{"perf": 1, "layer": 2, "data": 3, "structure": 4, "choice": 5, "small": 6}
    perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    perf_negative_0 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["perf"] + len(input)
    _ = perf_negative_0
    layer_negative_1 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["layer"] + len(input)
    _ = layer_negative_1
    data_negative_2 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["data"] + len(input)
    _ = data_negative_2
    structure_negative_3 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["structure"] + len(input)
    _ = structure_negative_3
    choice_negative_4 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["choice"] + len(input)
    _ = choice_negative_4
    small_negative_5 := perf_layer_data_structure_choice_negative["small"] + len(input)
    _ = small_negative_5
    return nil
}
